_meta.description: Solution-level integration umbrella — vendor self-attests to the listed cross-cutting integration capabilities across both internal (own application) and externally-integrated (third-party) modules.
_meta.source:
IMDA "User Discovery — Overall Integration Requirements V2" template
(provided by user 2026-06-03). 6 mandatory caps spanning Internal
Modules (3) + Externally-Integrated Modules (3). All tier=mandatory
per the IMDA "Importance" column.
_meta.ships_when: Caps populated 2026-06-03. Excel export wiring + DraftsContext editor support still pending — see TASKS.md.

umbrella_question: Does your solution provide robust cross-module integration capabilities — across both your own application's internal modules and any externally-integrated third-party modules — consistent across every module in this submission?

caps.name: ERP Interoperability (Internal)
caps.description:
Your solution provides data integration for all ERP modules within
your own application, ensuring a seamless and consistent information
flow across all business functions without manual intervention.

caps.name: User Documentation (Internal)
caps.description:
Your solution provides documentation for all inter-module workflows
within your application, for ease of referencing and troubleshooting.

caps.name: Data Health Monitoring
caps.description:
Your solution implements methods to prevent data transfer failures
between internal modules — for example, user-facing error messages
and error-tracking dashboards.

caps.name: ERP Interoperability (Integration)
caps.description:
Your solution provides data integration with all externally-integrated
ERP modules (third-party systems integrated at the customer's request),
ensuring a seamless and consistent information flow across all
business functions without manual intervention.

caps.name: User Documentation (Integration)
caps.description:
Your solution documents all integrated data fields exchanged with
third-party modules, for ease of reference and troubleshooting.

caps.name: Audit Logging and Monitoring
caps.description:
Your solution provides a dashboard to track connection health and
data transmission status across third-party integrations, and
automatically captures logs of any errors encountered.
